name: Authentic Paella Valenciana
instructions:
1. Heat a paella pan over medium-high heat, and coat with olive oil. Add chicken, rabbit, and garlic; cook and stir until nicely browned.

2. Move the browned meat to the sides of the pan, and add tomato, butter beans, peas, and green beans. Season with paprika, and mix well.

3. Fill the paella pan with water, almost to the top. Bring to a boil.

4. Simmer for about 1 hour to make a broth. Season with salt, saffron for color, thyme, and rosemary.

5. Stir in half as much rice as the amount of water added. Cover, reduce heat to low, and simmer until all of the liquid has been absorbed, about 20 minutes.
simpleInstructions:
1. Brown chicken, rabbit, and garlic in a paella pan with olive oil.

2. Add tomato, butter beans, peas, and green beans. Season with paprika.

3. Fill pan with water; boil then simmer to make a broth.

4. Season broth, add rice, cover, and simmer until liquid is absorbed.
